text: I feel a heightened sense of awareness in this place—a blend of anticipation and intellectual curiosity. The clean, modern atmosphere outside the meeting room sets the stage for minds coming together to exchange ideas, while the colorful R+D display evokes wonder about humanity’s pursuit of knowledge and our evolving relationship with technology. I’m compelled to reflect on how we shape, and are shaped by, our creations. Surrounded by the artifacts of research and development, I’m both participant and observer, marveling at the dance between curiosity and innovation.
